name: Amphora
description: Museum shelves of clay vessels — bellies swell, necks stretch and glazes trade places with every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( border-bottom: calc(26px / @Y) solid rgba(90, 70, 50, 0.3); box-sizing: border-box; /* body and neck share one emitted clay and height so the vessel stays whole */ --clay: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --vh: @r(42, 60); --vw: @r(36, 54); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 4%; left: calc((100 - @var(--vw)) / 2 * 1%); width: calc(@var(--vw) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--vh) * 1%); border-radius: 46% 46% 40% 40% / 62% 62% 34% 34%; background: @var(--clay); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: calc(@var(--vh) * 1% + 2%); left: 44%; width: 12%; height: @rand(12%, 22%); border-radius: 20% 20% 0 0; background: @var(--clay); box-shadow: 0 calc(-14px / @Y) 0 calc(6px / @Y) @var(--clay); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
